Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Go ahead and take that home with you. That should just about do it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Could you two take these boxes over to the music room?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}I think the boxes are packed full of sheet music. They're really heavy, so be careful not to hurt yourselves.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Yes. You know where the music room is, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}I think the boxes are full of sheet music. They're really heavy, so be careful not to hurt yourselves.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I signed for these packages on behalf of the music club, but I can't keep them here forever...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}That damn Ekoda— I mean, Mr. Ekoda has been talking my ear off, nagging me to get them out of here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}C'mon, we can't let the poor teacher carry all that herself. Let's help her out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Ooh, now that's what I like to hear, Mochizuki-kun![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Why don't I bump both your Composition grades up a little? Joking, of course.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I wouldn't mind handling this by myself, but I did just transfer here...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Do you think you could show me the way to the music room?[n]{f 1 1}
